idea-plugin.name: Task Manager
idea-plugin.description:
Task management plugin with Claude Code integration for tracking and executing project tasks directly from the IDE.

Features

  • Organize tasks into collapsible groups with automatic status tracking
  • Task statuses: New, In Progress, Completed, Paused, Cancelled
  • Each task links to a Markdown file with detailed description and instructions
  • Run tasks via Claude Code — opens a terminal with /task-execute skill
  • Create tasks from the UI or via /task-create Claude skill
  • Completed groups auto-collapse and fade, sinking to the bottom of the list
  • Pagination with configurable page size
  • Available as a side panel, bottom panel, or editor tab
  • Auto-archiving of completed groups to keep the task file compact

Storage

Tasks are stored per-project in .claude/tasks/tasks.json with Markdown docs in .claude/tasks/docs/. Completed groups are archived to archive.json automatically.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.10.0

  • New /task-setup skill — configures permissions for the project in one command
  • "Setup Permissions" button in the toolbar — runs /task-setup via Claude
  • Removed per-call permissions check from task-execute skill

1.9.0

  • CLI list now includes tracker config — eliminates separate config call
  • Filter tasks by status: --status, --all flags (default: active only)
  • list output includes md file path for each task
  • Fix task-cli.sh not bundled in plugin JAR
  • Fix VFS refresh triggering full project reindexing
  • Tasks can be completed without a commit (analysis, research tasks)

1.8.0

  • Commit tracking: tasks can store a commit hash, shown as a diff button in the UI
  • CLI helper script (task-cli.sh) for agents to list, create, update tasks without raw JSON
  • Skills updated to use task-cli.sh — faster and less error-prone
  • Install Skills now also copies task-cli.sh to .claude/tasks/
  • Git4Idea integration for viewing commit diffs

1.7.0

  • Add "Commands" tab — lists all Claude commands and skills from project and global .claude/
  • Run any command/skill with one click directly from the UI
  • Open source .md files of commands and skills in the editor
  • Commands grouped by scope: project commands, project skills, global commands, global skills

1.6.0

  • Auto-initialize project task files on first plugin open
  • Add "Install Claude Skills" toolbar button — copies task-execute and task-create skills into the project's .claude/skills/
  • Bundle skill files in plugin resources

1.5.0

  • Prepare for GitHub publication — add README with full setup instructions
  • Copy Claude skill prompts into the repository under skills/

1.4.0

  • External tracker integration: Linear, Jira, GitHub Issues, YouTrack
  • Tracker settings dialog accessible from the toolbar
  • Clickable issue ID links in group headers
  • Auto-create issues in external trackers via MCP (task-create skill)

1.3.0

  • Create Task buttons now launch Claude with /task-create skill in terminal

1.2.0

  • Add Refresh button to the toolbar
  • Show task creation date and last update time

1.1.0

  • Detailed plugin description
  • Version managed from gradle.properties

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Task groups with collapsible lists and status tracking
  • Task statuses: New, In Progress, Completed, Paused, Cancelled
  • Markdown docs linked to each task
  • Run tasks via Claude /task-execute
  • Pagination with configurable page size
  • Side panel, bottom panel, and editor tab views
  • Auto-archiving of completed groups

action.description: Open Task Manager in editor tab
